MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, DANIEL BALDWIN's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.
